channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Mexico seeks prosecutions over deaths in US after fatal ICE shooting
item.description: Mexico's government has strongly criticized how its citizens are treated under President Trump's push for increased deportations.

item.title: Former Epoch Times CFO pleads guilty in $67 million money laundering case
item.description: The former chief financial officer of The Epoch Times halted jury selection to plead guilty in a money laundering case.

item.title: EasyJet accepts takeover offer from Apollo, over Castlerock's bid
item.description: British budget airline EasyJet says it has reached an agreement in principle for a £5.7-billion ($7.7-billion) takeover by U.S. private equity firm Apollo.

item.title: Total of 8 suspects now indicted in alleged plot to attack White House UFC event
item.description: A total of eight men have been indicted for their alleged roles in the plot to attack a UFC event on the grounds of the White House last month.
